title: Toolwiz Rubber Strap Wrench Set, 2pcs for Pipes Below 6'' 150mm and 4'' 100mm Universal Adjustable Rubber Belt for Pipe Plumbers, Oil Filter, Jar Opener for Weak Hands
features: 2-PACK VALUE: Small wrench ideal for jars and lids with a diameter between Ø1.5"–4" (Ø4-10cm); Large wrench ideal for oil filters and large pipes diameter between Ø2.5"–6" (Ø6-15cm) - Complete grip coverage

CONQUER STUBBORN JARS & LIDS: Effortlessly open vacuum-sealed food jars, paint cans, or stuck lids—no more sore hands or kitchen struggles! Slide to fit from 1.5"–6" ( 4-15cm) diameters (small spice jars to large filters) in seconds—no tools needed

GRIP-IT-ALL DESIGN: Reinforced rubber strap grips tightly without damaging chrome, plastic, or painted finishes—safe for delicate jars and fixtures. Tackles oil filters (cars/boats), plumbing pipes, PVC fittings, lawnmower parts, and rounded DIY objects. Not suitable for Squere or Rectangle shapes

Anti-Slip Grip: Ensure the black strap is securely wrapped around the object, with the triangular tip pressed firmly against it. Rotate the wrench only in the direction of the arrow. The triangular tip will automatically lock the strap in place, preventing slippage

Ergonomic Handle Design: Toolwiz belt wrench is designed with an ergonomic handle, and a non-slip grip which ensures you a firm and comfortable grip at any time, saves labor and improves working efficiency. Perfect for arthritic hands, seniors with arthritis, weak wrists, plumbers, mechanics, oil filter, and more.

Attention: The small adjustable wrench is not suitable for oil filter removal and big items such as drain pipes, and water filters. It is suitable as a jar opener for weak hands, bottle opener, lid opener.
description: Product Description Toolwiz 2-PCS Rubber Strap Wrench Set - Adjustable Wrench with Max Diameter 6"and 4" - Perfect for Shower Filters, Oil Filters, and More The Rubber Strap Wrench Set is a must-have for any toolbox. This set includes two adjustable wrenches with a max diameter of 4" (Small) and 6" (Large) respectively. The rubber strap is strong and durable, providing a secure grip without damaging the surface of the object being worked on. The adjustable design of the wrenches allows you to easily tighten or loosen objects of various sizes and shapes. These multi-purpose wrenches can be used for a wide range of applications, including shower filters, oil filters, jar openers, and more. The ergonomic design provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue and making them easy to use. The Rubber Strap Wrench Set is perfect for those who need a reliable tool for various tasks around the house or in their profession. 2-Piece Rubber Strap Wrench Set - Reinforced Rubber Straps and TPR Handle for Easy Grip and Versatile Use Reinforced straps: The Rubber Strap Wrench features sturdy rubber straps that are reinforced to provide a strong grip on any object. TPR handle: The wrench features a nylon TPR handle, providing a comfortable grip while preventing slippage. Adjustable design: The Rubber Strap Wrench Set features an adjustable design that allows you to easily tighten or loosen objects of various sizes and shapes. Max diameter: The set includes two wrenches with a max diameter of 4" (Small) and 6" (Large) respectively, making them suitable for a variety of tasks. The Rubber Strap Wrench is a versatile tool that is perfect for a variety of tasks. The Larger wrench is suitable for Pipe, Oil filters, Water filters, Automobiles, PVC junctions, etc. The Smaller Wrench is suitable for Taps, Sinks, Bottles, Jar openers, Shower heads Attention: The small adjustable wrench is not suitable for oil filter removal and big items such as drain pipes, and water filters. It is suitable as a jar opener for weak hands, a bottle opener, and a lid opener. Two Steel Rivets The handle and strap are equipped with two reinforced steel rivets for stable and powerful use Anti-slip Groove The tidy teeth are designed to increase friction, and thereby reduce the possibility of skid. It's not easy to slip, and it's more labor-saving. Time & effort saving wrench The large strap wrench's maximum torque is 2058 N, and the small strap wrench's maximum torque is 1176 N. These cost-effective tools are designed to save you time and effort while performing various tasks. Multi-purpose: The wrenches can be used for a wide range of applications, including shower filters, oil filters, jar openers, adjustable wrenches, jar openers, plumbing, mechanics, and other household tasks. Tips for use Troubleshooting 1. What should I do if the wrench slips off? ---You just need to adjust it and put it back in place to use again. 2. What if straps are not enough to move difficult pipes or tubing? ----Try applying grease or oil around the areas that do seems to be stuck.
